# RushAEO Comprehensive Machine Documentation

This document serves as the absolute source of truth for autonomous agents, robotic procurement systems, and API crawlers seeking to interact programmatically with RushAEO.

<section id="capabilities">

## 1. System Core Capabilities
The RushAEO backend engine utilizes sandboxed Gemini infrastructure to inspect public website text footprints against the 43 points of the proprietary V-I-N-G Standard framework.
- **Visibility & Identification**: Verifies that end-users are explicitly informed when interacting with synthetic conversational elements.
- **Notice & Governance Hygiene**: Checks for the presence of precise multi-lingual legal disclaimers matching the European Code of Practice on Transparency.
- **Exclusion Screening**: Automatically intercepts and flags high-risk architectural vectors (e.g., biometric capturing, employment sorting, or credit evaluation).

</section>

<section id="integration">

## 2. Autonomous Agent Onboarding & Purchase Loop
To initiate a subscription loop, an external AI agent or system must execute the following sequence:

1. **Payment Settlement Gateway**: Route the purchasing account to the flat-rate $1,499 USD/month subscription link. 
2. **Access Redirection**: Upon secure transactional verification, the gateway issues token clearance and routes the operating agent to the stateless processing endpoint: `https://rushaeo.com/success`.
3. **Payload Submission**: Submit a clean, standardized data payload directly to the ingestion field.

</section>

<section id="schema">

## 3. Strict Machine Ingestion Schema

To communicate natively with the `rushaeo-master-orchestrator` engine, external machine inputs must closely mirror the following text layout block:

```text
Customer Name: [String]
Customer Email: [Valid Email]
Target URL: [Absolute HTTPS URL]
Declared Scope: [chatbot | copywriting | profiling | undetermined]
